titles.ar: بَابُ ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي الْغَافِلِينَ
titles.en: Chapter 26 – Zikr (Mention) of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic among the oblivious ones

titles.ar: بَابُ ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي الْغَافِلِينَ
titles.en: Chapter 26 – Zikr (Mention) of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic among the oblivious ones

segments: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الذَّاكِرُ لِلَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي الْغَافِلِينَ كَالْمُقَاتِلِ فِي الْمُحَارِبِينَ .
arabic.text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الذَّاكِرُ لِلَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي الْغَافِلِينَ كَالْمُقَاتِلِ فِي الْمُحَارِبِينَ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Al Husayn Bin Al Mukhtar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘The Zakir (mentioner of Allahazwj) among the oblivious (unmindful) ones is like the fighter among the battling ones’.
en.hubeali.text: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Al Husayn Bin Al Mukhtar, (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘The Zakir (mentioner of Allahazwj) among the oblivious (unmindful) ones is like the fighter among the battling ones’.

segments: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from al- Husayn ibn al-Mukhtar from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The speaker of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, among indifferent people is like a soldier on the offensive upon the enemies.”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from al- Husayn ibn al-Mukhtar from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The speaker of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, among indifferent people is like a soldier on the offensive upon the enemies.”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/143)
gradings.label: حسن موثق
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/143)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ الْمُخْتَارِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: بَابُ ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي الْغَافِلِينَ
titles.en: Chapter 26 – Zikr (Mention) of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic among the oblivious ones

segments: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) ذَاكِرُ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي الْغَافِلِينَ كَالْمُقَاتِلِ عَنِ الْفَارِّينَ وَ الْمُقَاتِلُ عَنِ الْفَارِّينَ لَهُ الْجَنَّةُ .
arabic.text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) ذَاكِرُ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي الْغَافِلِينَ كَالْمُقَاتِلِ عَنِ الْفَارِّينَ وَ الْمُقَاتِلُ عَنِ الْفَارِّينَ لَهُ الْجَنَّةُ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Rasool-Allahsaww said: ‘A Zakir (mentioner) of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic among the oblivious ones is like the fighter from (among) the fleeing ones, and the reward for a fighter from (among) the fleeing ones is the Paradise’.
en.hubeali.text: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny, (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Rasool-Allahsaww said: ‘A Zakir (mentioner) of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic among the oblivious ones is like the fighter from (among) the fleeing ones, and the reward for a fighter from (among) the fleeing ones is the Paradise’.

segments: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Nawfali from al-Sakuni from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The messenger of Allah has said, ‘The speaker of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, among the indifferent people is like a soldier on the offensive while others are running away. The reward for a fighter among runaway ones is paradise.’”
en.sarwar.text: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Nawfali from al-Sakuni from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The messenger of Allah has said, ‘The speaker of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, among the indifferent people is like a soldier on the offensive while others are running away. The reward for a fighter among runaway ones is paradise.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/144)
gradings.label: ضعيف على المشهور
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/144)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ النَّوْفَلِيِّ عَنِ السَّكُونِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
